title: Infosys Expands Collaboration with Telstra International
detailed_summary: Infosys announced on July 21, 2025 that it expanded its existing collaboration with Telstra and will act as the strategic partner for Telstra International, Telstra's global arm. The collaboration is intended to support Telstra's Connected Future 30 strategy, advance technology leadership, drive innovation, streamline operations, improve efficiency, and create new go-to-market opportunities. Infosys will use an AI-first approach to modernize and streamline essential systems for Telstra International, with the stated goals of enhancing connectivity, driving business growth, and accelerating AI adoption. No contract value, duration, revenue contribution, or financial guidance was disclosed.
